Lead qualification AI Agent

An agent that replies to every inbound lead in seconds, qualifies them on the spot, and routes the hot ones straight to your team — fully built, hosted, and managed by us.

Book a free call

20-minute call · Live in days

Typically 3×·more qualified conversations for your teamSeconds·to first response, day or nightDays, not months·from brief to a live qualification agent

What it does

An AI lead qualification agent engages every inbound lead the moment they arrive, asks the questions your sales team would ask, scores how likely they are to buy, and routes the best ones to the right rep or into your CRM. It does this instantly, 24/7, in a natural conversation.

It's built for teams losing deals to slow follow-up: agencies, B2B SaaS, real estate, and service businesses where speed-to-lead decides who wins. Instead of leads going cold in a shared inbox overnight, every one gets an immediate, qualifying response.

Use cases

What your lead qualification agent handles

Instant lead response

Replies to new form fills, chats, and DMs in seconds — before a competitor gets there.

Qualifying questions

Asks about budget, timeline, team size, and use case, the way your best SDR would.

Intent scoring

Ranks each lead hot, warm, or cold based on their answers and behaviour, so reps prioritise correctly.

CRM routing

Pushes qualified leads — with notes and scores — straight into HubSpot, Salesforce, or your pipeline.

Meeting booking

Books qualified prospects directly onto the right rep's calendar without back-and-forth.

Disqualify politely

Filters out poor-fit leads with a helpful response, so your team never wastes a call.

How we build it

From brief to live agent — done for you

01

Discovery

You tell us what a good lead looks like, your qualifying criteria, and where leads should go — in one short call.

02

Build & integrate

We configure the agent's questions and scoring, then connect it to your forms, chat, and CRM.

03

Deploy & host

We put it live on your site and inbound channels, running on our infrastructure. No setup on your end.

04

Monitor & improve

We watch conversations, refine the scoring, and adjust as your ideal customer profile evolves.

Hosted & monitored for you

It runs on our infrastructure with 24/7 monitoring, so no lead ever goes unanswered.

Tuned to your sales process

Asks your qualifying questions, scores against your criteria, and routes by your rules.

FAQ

Common questions

What is an AI lead qualification agent?

It's an AI software agent that engages every inbound lead instantly, asks qualifying questions, scores their intent, and routes the best leads to your sales team or CRM — automatically and 24/7.

How does it decide which leads are qualified?

We configure it with your qualifying criteria — things like budget, timeline, company size, and use case. It asks those questions in a natural conversation, scores the answers, and ranks each lead hot, warm, or cold so your reps focus on the best ones.

Does it work with my CRM?

Yes. We integrate it with CRMs like HubSpot and Salesforce so qualified leads are pushed in automatically with their conversation notes and score attached. It can also book meetings directly onto a rep's calendar.

Why does speed-to-lead matter?

Leads are far more likely to convert when they get a response within minutes. This agent replies in seconds, around the clock, so leads never go cold waiting in an inbox overnight or over the weekend.

How long does it take to go live?

Most lead qualification agents are live within days. After a short discovery call, we build, integrate, and deploy it for you — nothing to install or configure on your side.

Do I need to manage AI accounts or API keys?

No. We manage all model access and API costs on our infrastructure. You get a working agent connected to your stack — no DevOps and no usage bills.

Ready for your own lead qualification agent?

Book a free 20-minute call. We'll tell you exactly what your agent can do and build it for you — API costs, integrations, and hosting included.
